creator: dougb@dougbarton.us
text:
The solution to this problem is to split the current samba script into 1
script per service, then write a samba rc.d script that handles
samba_enable the way that the current script does to avoid POLA.

Timur, if I have your permission to do that, I'm happy to send you a set
of scripts to review/approve.

Doug
